GOLDEN_EXTREMUM_BITS last_max0=8000000000000000 last_min1=0000000000000000 last_nan=7ff8000000005678 strided_max0=8000000000000000 strided_min1=0000000000000000 strided_nan=7ff8000000005678
GOLDEN_API_AMAX_AMIN_BITS max=8000000000000000,4000000000000000,7ff8000000005678,4010000000000000 min=c000000000000000,0000000000000000,7ff8000000005678,3ff0000000000000
